title: oxydectes klaenzei
side_effects: Oxydectes klaenzei can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal problems, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, as well as allergic reactions like skin rashes and itching. In severe cases, improper use of the plant can lead to more serious health issues, such as liver damage and respiratory failure. Prolonged exposure to the plant's toxic compounds can also cause neurological symptoms, including seizures, tremors, and confusion. Furthermore, improper use of oxydectes klaenzei can interact with other medications, exacerbating their side effects and potentially leading to life-threatening conditions.
